home.emptyTodaySubtitle: You don't have any task, enjoy your day.

addTodo.todayCaption: If you disable today, the task will be considered as tomorrow
addTodo.alertCaption: You will receive an alert at the time you set for this reminder

errors.notificationPermission: Notification permissions are required to set alerts.
errors.timeRequired: Please select a time for the task.
errors.pastTime: The selected time has already passed. Please pick a future time.
errors.notificationSchedule: The notification failed to schedule, make sure the hour is valid.

onboarding.title: Welcome to Minima
onboarding.feature1Body: Minima is a simple app that helps you to increase your productivity.
onboarding.feature2Body: Get notified when it's time to do your tasks.
onboarding.feature3Body: Enjoy a simple design that allows you to focus only on what you have to do.

notification.title: It's time! You have a task to do!!!
